reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.9.0: addresses unopenable exported PNGs whose root cause is the OneDrive-synced Downloads folder rather than the app. Since 0.8.9 verifies the file byte-for-byte after writing, a file that still cannot be opened was altered by the cloud client afterwards. The app now detects cloud-synced destinations and warns before saving, defaults the export dialog to a non-synced folder, and offers to reveal the saved file in Explorer (which also hydrates OneDrive placeholders).
